summary: Konekt B2B Platform Iteration 342 - Multi-Country Settings Architecture. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: Settings Hub country selector works correctly with TZ/KE/UG buttons. Country-specific settings (VAT, currency) load correctly. Public expansion page at /launch-country works for Kenya/Uganda/Rwanda/Ghana interest registration.

integration_issues.issue: /account/expand/ke and /account/expand/ug routes require authentication and redirect admin users to /admin. The CountryExpansionPage component is in pages/public/ but routes are under /account which requires auth.
integration_issues.note: Public expansion page at /launch-country provides same functionality without auth requirement

action_items: Consider moving /account/expand/ke and /account/expand/ug routes to public routes if they should be accessible without login, OR document that /launch-country is the intended public expansion page
critical_code_review_comments: CountryExpansionPage is in pages/public/ but routes are under /account which requires authentication - potential routing mismatch
Settings Hub country selector correctly uses data-testid attributes for TZ/KE/UG buttons
Replicate endpoint correctly adjusts VAT (KE=16%, UG=18%) and currency (KES, UGX) based on target country

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All core features verified, minor routing note for expansion pages

seed_data_creation: None required - KE settings already exist from previous replication
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-country settings architecture verified: 1) GET /api/admin/settings-hub?country=TZ returns 18% VAT, TZS currency. 2) GET /api/admin/settings-hub?country=KE returns 16% VAT, KES currency. 3) POST /api/admin/settings-hub/replicate copies settings with country-specific adjustments. 4) Settings Hub shows country selector bar with TZ/KE/UG buttons at top. 5) Public expansion page at /launch-country allows interest registration for Kenya/Uganda/Rwanda/Ghana. 6) Dashboard shows 7 KPI cards. 7) Notification badge shows '4' in header.

settings_hub_country_selector.details: Country selector bar at top of Settings Hub with TZ/KE/UG buttons. data-testid='settings-country-bar', data-testid='country-btn-TZ/KE/UG'

replicate_settings.details: POST /api/admin/settings-hub/replicate copies settings from source to target with country-specific adjustments (VAT, currency, timezone)

put_settings_ke.details: PUT /api/admin/settings-hub?country=KE saves settings under settings_hub_KE key

public_expansion_page.details: /launch-country shows expansion interest form for Kenya, Uganda, Rwanda, Ghana with Business Interest and Partner Application tabs

dashboard_kpi_cards.details: Dashboard loads with 7 KPI cards (Orders Today, Revenue, Profit, Pending Payments, Active Quotes, Open Delays, Pending Approvals)

sidebar_feedback_badge.details: Notification badge shows '4' in header area
